tasks.label: 1. Build for Luckfox (Debug)
tasks.command: mkdir -p build && cd build && cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=../toolchain.cmake .. && make -j$(nproc)
tasks.detail: Сборка mylogger с символами (-g -O0) для ARM

tasks.label: 2. Deploy to Luckfox
tasks.command: ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@${config:luckfox.ip} 'killall gdbserver 2>/dev/null; true' && scp ${workspaceFolder}/build/mylogger root@${config:luckfox.ip}:/userdata/Logger_new && ssh root@${config:luckfox.ip} 'chmod +x /userdata/Logger_new'

tasks.label: 3. Deploy GDB binary to Luckfox
tasks.command: ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@${config:luckfox.ip} 'killall gdbserver 2>/dev/null; true' && scp ${workspaceFolder}/build/mylogger root@${config:luckfox.ip}:/userdata/Logger_new.gdb && ssh root@${config:luckfox.ip} 'chmod +x /userdata/Logger_new.gdb'

tasks.label: 4. Start gdbserver on board
tasks.command: ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o ServerAliveInterval=30 root@${config:luckfox.ip} 'killall gdbserver Logger_new.gdb 2>/dev/null; true; exec gdbserver --once :1234 /userdata/Logger_new.gdb'
tasks.detail: gdbserver --once :1234 (завершится после Stop в VS Code)

tasks.label: 5. Stop gdbserver on board
tasks.command: ssh -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@${config:luckfox.ip} 'killall gdbserver Logger_new.gdb 2>/dev/null; true'
tasks.detail: Принудительно остановить gdbserver и Logger_new.gdb на плате
